generatorNotes:
Successfully set up Playwright E2E testing infrastructure:

1. Created root package.json with @playwright/test ^1.43.1 in devDependencies
2. Created playwright.config.ts at repo root with baseURL: 'http://localhost:3000' and testDir: './e2e'
3. Installed Playwright chromium browser with dependencies (verified exit code 0)
4. Created e2e/smoke.spec.ts that loads homepage and asserts page title is non-empty
5. Verified test execution with exit code 0 (1 test passed in 686ms)
6. Created e2e.md with comprehensive documentation about E2E testing setup, usage, and conventions
7. Updated CLAUDE.md to include E2E testing information in Tech Stack, Project Structure, Entry Points, Dependencies, and Developer Notes sections

All acceptance criteria met and verified. Documentation follows project standards with module-level docs and architecture updates.
